overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an FBI agent character exploring a rustic waterfront harbor area with log cabin architecture. The character walks along wooden docks and walkways, passes an NPC by a parked car, and enters a building to approach a reception desk. The setting features autumn foliage, warm morning lighting, and Pacific Northwest atmosphere.

events.description: approaching NPC standing with arms crossed by parked sedan

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet wooden boardwalk toward a rustic log cabin building in a waterfront setting. An NPC stands with arms crossed leaning against a beige sedan parked near the entrance, while a white van sits further back. Autumn trees with red and orange foliage surround the area, and an American flag hangs from the building's covered porch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wooden pier extending over water with moored sailboats

approaching wooden gate structure at the end of the dock

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock toward the harbor, passing moored boats with mountains visible in the background

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera along the dock toward a large sailboat

large sailboat with tall masts docked at the pier
misty forested mountains rising in the background
wooden safety railing along the dock edge
small wooden structure with red life preserver ring

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the building area onto an open wooden dock extending over the water. A large sailboat is moored to the left with misty mountains visible in the distance. The character follows another pedestrian walking ahead toward the end of the pier, passing a life preserver station and wooden railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway along log building exterior with storage containers

moving into shadowed covered walkway along the building side

entered.detail: wooden barrier gate with diagonal cross braces
wooden sign reading BILLIE'S BOAT YARD hanging from fence
large blue plastic storage bins stacked near the building
wooden barrels and nautical equipment near building wall

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a wooden gate marked 'Billie's Boat Yard' and walks along a covered wooden walkway on the building's exterior. The area features blue storage containers, wooden barrels, and nautical equipment. The lighting becomes more diffused and shadowed as the character moves under the building's overhang, with autumn trees visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic reception area with stone fireplace and wooden counter

approaching the reception desk where an NPC is seated

large wooden reception counter with papers and office supplies
large stone fireplace with chimney rising to ceiling

table lamp providing warm interior lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters the log cabin building through glass double doors into a warmly lit interior. Sunlight streams through windows illuminating a rustic reception area with a large stone fireplace, wooden cabinets, and a reception desk. An NPC sits behind the desk as the character approaches, creating a cozy Pacific Northwest lodge atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a crisp autumn waterfront exterior into the warm, sheltered interior of a rustic lodge. It begins with the character walking along a wet wooden boardwalk past a parked beige sedan and an American flag, surrounded by vibrant red and orange foliage. As the character moves away from the building, the scene opens onto a wide wooden dock extending over the water toward misty mountains, following a pedestrian past a moored sailboat and life preserver stations. The camera then shifts back toward the shore, passing through a gate marked Billie's Boat Yard and moving under a shadowed wooden overhang filled with blue storage containers and nautical equipment. Finally, the character enters through glass double doors, where the diffused outdoor light transforms into a cozy, sun-drenched interior featuring a large stone fireplace and a reception desk.
